creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #31)

> We're pretty late in the cycle for more patches, but it's sufficiently small and
> self-contained that we might be able to persuade re@ to take it.
That's good !

> We do need to get it into stable/12 (and 13) asap so we can ask.

> Did you want to prepare the MFC, or should I do them to get them in asap?
I'd glad to if approved :)
